customers_say: Customers find the smart door lock to be of excellent quality and reliable, with one noting it works without any lag. The installation process is easy, and customers appreciate that it offers multiple functionality options at a lower cost. They praise its security features, with one customer mentioning there's no need to worry about keys, and find it user-friendly, with one noting the app is super intuitive. Customers are satisfied with the service they receive.

reviews.author: Anirban
reviews.title: Smart lock with outstanding security
reviews.body: Excellent Smart Lock with Outstanding Security and Support I’ve been using this smart lock for several months, and it has exceeded my expectations in every way. The security features are excellent, giving me complete peace of mind when I’m away from home. Features such as real-time activity tracking, tamper alerts, auto-lock functionality, and secure access management make it a reliable solution for protecting my property. The mobile app is incredibly user-friendly and intuitive. Setting up the lock was straightforward, and the app makes it easy to lock or unlock the door remotely, create temp

reviews.author: Rupa chatterjee
reviews.title: Useful system every house need nowdays
reviews.body: Value for money , good battery back up, amd easy to use and install

reviews.author: Murali
reviews.title: Good Product, But Customer Support Needs Faster Response
reviews.body: After multiple follow-ups and considerable waiting, the technician finally visited and fixed the issues. The lock itself is working well and I am satisfied with the product’s performance. However, the customer support experience needs significant improvement. The turnaround time (TAT) for service requests was much longer than expected, and communication during the process could have been better. If the support team can respond faster and reduce service delays, the overall customer experience would be much better. Overall, a good product, but the after-sales service needs attention.
